Managed Open-Source Stack

Enterprise tools. Startup prices.

Pre-configured, hosted, and maintained. You focus on marketing, we handle infrastructure.

Starter

Essential open-source marketing tools, hosted and maintained.

$49 /mo
  • Listmonk email automation
  • Plausible analytics
  • Basic CRM setup
  • Weekly backups
  • Email support
Get Started
Most Popular

Growth

Full marketing stack with advanced automation and priority support.

$149 /mo
  • Everything in Starter
  • Advanced workflow automation
  • A/B testing infrastructure
  • Custom integrations
  • Daily backups
  • Priority Slack support
  • Monthly optimization review
Get Started

Enterprise

Complete AI marketing architecture with dedicated support.

$399 /mo
  • Everything in Growth
  • Custom AI agent setup
  • Dedicated infrastructure
  • Multi-channel automation
  • Real-time backups
  • Dedicated support engineer
  • Weekly strategy calls
  • Custom SLA

Services

Invest in outcomes, not hours.

Flexible engagements designed for growing businesses.

Fractional AI-CMO

Senior marketing strategist + builder. Weekly engagement.

$3,000 /mo
  • Strategy + implementation
  • AI marketing architecture
  • Team training included
  • Bi-weekly reports
  • 4 strategy calls/month
Book Discovery Call

Custom projects and AI Workflow Implementation quoted per engagement. Get a custom quote →

Pricing FAQ

Common pricing questions

Each plan includes hosted, configured, and maintained open-source marketing tools. We handle updates, backups, security patches, and monitoring so you can focus on marketing.

Yes. Plans are month-to-month with no long-term contracts. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

For larger teams or custom AI marketing architecture projects, we create tailored proposals. Contact us for a free discovery call.

No setup fees for managed stack plans. Custom AI architecture projects include implementation costs quoted separately during discovery.

HextonHQ

Extraordinary things happen when extraordinary technology reaches ordinary people. We build, host, and teach AI-powered marketing systems.
